# cap-button



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property    | Attribute    | Description                                      | Type                                                | Default     |
| ----------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `ariaLabel` | `aria-label` | Accessible label for icon-only buttons           | `string`                                            | `undefined` |
| `disabled`  | `disabled`   | Disables the button                              | `boolean`                                           | `false`     |
| `fullWidth` | `full-width` | Stretches the button to full container width     | `boolean`                                           | `false`     |
| `loading`   | `loading`    | Shows a loading spinner and disables interaction | `boolean`                                           | `false`     |
| `size`      | `size`       | Size of the button                               | `"lg" \| "md" \| "sm"`                              | `'md'`      |
| `type`      | `type`       | HTML button type                                 | `"button" \| "reset" \| "submit"`                   | `'button'`  |
| `variant`   | `variant`    | Visual style of the button                       | `"danger" \| "outline" \| "primary" \| "secondary"` | `'primary'` |


## Events

| Event      | Description                        | Type                      |
| ---------- | ---------------------------------- | ------------------------- |
| `capClick` | Emitted when the button is clicked | `CustomEvent<MouseEvent>` |
